imageAlt: SC: Match to unexplained transactions roadmap item preview image
title: SC: Match to unexplained transactions
summaryBody: Increase BTM coverage by allowing matches to unexplained transactions - this would mean transactions that weren’t guessed, or couldn’t be guessed, could still be matched to SC uploads
detailBody: Increase BTM coverage by allowing matches to unexplained transactions - this would mean transactions that weren’t guessed, or couldn’t be guessed, could still be matched to SC uploads
